findings.desc: BUG-1: Single-char quote input -> IndexOf(char, 1, -1) throws ArgumentOutOfRangeException.
BUG-2: Single-char double-quote input -> input[1..^1] range exception.
Unclosed opening quote at start silently discards all input content.
Adjacent quoted strings emit 2 tokens not 1. Closing quote triggers yield+reset.
Empty option name not rejected: '--:value' produces currentOption='' silently.
OQ-3: KeyNotFoundException if unknown option bypasses ValidateNoUnknownOptions step.
OQ-3(new): Missing required option (Min>0) not detected here — only detected via ValidateConfigurationAsync.

lean_setup.note: Mathlib removed from lakefile.toml as of this run (PR opened 2026-05-01). Do NOT add back unless a .lean file actually imports Mathlib.
lean_setup.elan_install_note: Network blocked in sandbox. Use leanprover/lean4-action or standard elan-init.sh in CI. For local: elan v3.1.0 or v4.2.1 via tarball.
lean_setup.lake_build_cmd: cd formal-verification/lean && PATH=$HOME/.elan/bin:$PATH lake update && lake build
lean_setup.important_note: String.replace, String.startsWith etc are @[extern] and NOT kernel-reducible. Use native_decide for concrete string evaluation. decide works for pure Prop/Bool/Int without String ops. omega for integer arithmetic.
lean_setup.manifest: formal-verification/lean/lake-manifest.json — run 'lake update' after removing mathlib to regenerate

argument_arity_lean.tactic_notes: native_decide needed for pairs involving INT32_MAX=2147483647. decide works for small-value pairs.
